summary: The real Hermes gateway was checked under systemd, recovered after controlled process termination through Restart=always, and passed post-recovery Hermes status plus Kanban CLI health checks.
scope: real Hermes runtime, hermes-gateway.service, service-manager recovery, post-recovery monitoring checks
limits: This proof satisfies production_rollback_monitoring only for the current gateway recovery and health-check path.
It does not prove code-version rollback, package rollback, Discord integration, cloud rollback, external monitoring, full deployment rollback or the complete Hermes update receipt.
The direct unprivileged systemctl restart command returned non-zero; the proven recovery path is controlled process termination followed by systemd Restart=always recovery.
Raw runtime output, local paths, process ids, service logs and private runtime identifiers are intentionally not stored in the public repository.
